results.title: How To Play Chess: The Ultimate Beginner Guide
results.reason: GothamChess is the most popular creator for beginners, and this comprehensive 31-minute guide is widely cited in comments as the gold standard for starting from zero.
summary: Learn how every piece moves on the board
Understand the basic rules and goal of chess
Discover how to start your first game correctly
Master simple ways to trap the enemy king

results.title: How to Play Chess: Chess Rules for Beginners | ChessKid
results.reason: ChessKid specializes in absolute beginner pedagogy, offering the most structured and easy-to-follow rules explanation for new players.
summary: Learn the names and values of all pieces
Follow the rules for setting up the board
Understand special moves like castling and promotion
Find out how to end the game properly

results.title: The ONLY Chess Guide you need (1 hour+)
results.reason: Extremely high depth and value for a single video, though the 80-minute length may be intimidating for casual beginners.
summary: Go from a total beginner to a player
Learn smart strategies for the early game
Understand how to think during your turn
Master the most important patterns to win

results.title: Basic Chess Openings Explained
results.reason: A concise breakdown of essential openings that viewers praise for making complex theory digestible in under 10 minutes.
summary: Learn why the first moves are so important
Control the center of the board with pawns
Get your pieces out and ready for battle
Keep your king safe early in the game

results.title: The BEST Beginner Chess Opening
results.reason: Focuses on a specific opening (Ponziani) which viewers appreciate for its simplicity and effectiveness at lower ELO levels.
summary: Learn one easy setup for every game
Follow simple steps that work for beginners
Avoid common mistakes in the first few moves
Build a strong defense for your king
